summary: Full backend + frontend testing of TAHSILAT MAKBUZU payment voucher system. All 12 backend pytest cases passed and all UI flows (Excel sample calc, rate-required warning, save→history→print→delete, settings update) worked end-to-end with exact expected values.

issues: Radix Dialog console warning: 'Missing Description or aria-describedby' for DialogContent — accessibility lint, not blocking.

action_items: Optional: add <DialogDescription> (or aria-describedby) to SettingsDialog's DialogContent to silence the Radix accessibility warning.
critical_code_review_comments: compute() raises HTTPException directly from a pure helper — acceptable in FastAPI but mixes layers; consider moving the rate-validation check into the route or raising a domain error.
compute(): when i17 > 0, i25 uses 'i23 / i17 if (i23 / i17) > 0 else 0' (matches Excel IF). Fine, but the redundant double division could be replaced by computing once.
Voucher.created_at is stored as ISO string (good for JSON), but vouchers are sorted by string — works for ISO-8601 UTC strings, acceptable.
PrintVoucher row 'Fatura Tutar' shows raw voucher.d21 even when 0 (renders 0.00); minor UX nit.
Frontend caches settings in state — after PUT /settings the dashboard correctly re-uses returned data (toast + setSettings). Good.
seed_data_creation: Tests create/delete TEST_-prefixed vouchers and self-cleanup. Settings reset to kdv_rate=10, invoice_divisor=2 at end of run (verified via GET /api/settings).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend tests live at /app/backend/tests/backend_test.py (pytest, 12 cases). Public URL = REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL. Default settings: kdv=10, divisor=2. Excel canonical sample: d17=2000, i17=46, d21=32000 → d19=46000, d23=1273.9130434782608, d27=2000, valid=true. data-testids documented in review_request work as-is.
